bounded_claim: On the existing Phase Alpha runtime surfaces, selected evidence can show why aoa-memo-contradiction-integrity remains blocked: alpha-05 preserved a general contradiction map and memo delta, but no lifecycle-aware object recall rerun exercised superseded, retracted, or still-open memo objects. This is gap evidence only.

same memo-first rerun posture: inspect then capsule then expand
same human-review requirement before treating memo evidence as proof

do_not_overread: does not prove contradiction handling quality
does not prove lifecycle-aware object recall over superseded or retracted memo objects
